modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble accessing the scholarship gateway due to account error.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to get into the scholarship manager, but I keep getting this "Account Error" message. It happens when I want to apply for scholarships, and it says there was an error with my account activation. I am not sure what went wrong, but it is very frustrating because I need to access the page.
short_description: Trouble accessing the scholarship gateway due to account error.
description: I am trying to get into the scholarship manager, but I keep getting this "Account Error" message. It happens when I want to apply for scholarships, and it says there was an error with my account activation. I am not sure what went wrong, but it is very frustrating because I need to access the page.
